steps.title: Find when the constant appears
steps.content:
The constant $2.68$ is the value of $F(x)$ when the variable part is $0$:
$$F(x)=2.68-0.17(x-3)$$
$$x-3=0$$
$$x=3$$

steps.title: Translate the month count
steps.content: The variable $x$ counts months after September $1$, $2014$. Three months after September $1$, $2014$, is December $1$, $2014$. The answer is D.
